title: PrismRefractPlan
description: Structured output schema for Prism Subagent C (refraction planning). Describes structural changes to apply.

structure_changes.description: Ordered list of structural improvements to apply (e.g. 'Wrap task in <task> XML tag')

xml_tags_suggested.description: XML tag names to introduce (e.g. task, context, constraints, format)

cot_trigger.description: True if the task warrants a chain-of-thought trigger phrase

cot_phrase.description: The recommended CoT trigger phrase if cot_trigger is true

pre_fill_header.description: Suggested pre-filled assistant response header (empty string if none)

cache_candidates.description: Sections identified as stable/cacheable (suitable for cache_control breakpoints)

rules_applied.description: IDs of refraction rules that triggered (e.g. ref-001, ref-005)

verbosity_flags.description: Verbose phrases detected in the prompt (e.g. 'we shall', 'could you please')
